title: Assorted Colors Wood Nail Files in Assorted Sizes (Pack of 30) - Double-Sided, Ideal for Hands & Feet
features: DOUBLE-SIDED DESIGN: Each nail file boasts a dual surface feature, one side is coarse for shaping nails with precision, while the flip side is fine, perfect for smoothing nail edges. Achieve salon-quality results from the comfort of your own home.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Crafted from high-quality wood, these nail files are durable, flexible, and gentle on the nails and cuticles, designed for long-lasting use and optimal nail care.

ERGONOMIC USAGE: Experience comfort as you beautify your nails. These pack of 30 nail files are ergonomically designed to fit comfortably in your hand, ensuring ease of use and preventing hand fatigue during those detailed filing sessions.

ALL-ROUNDER: Tailored for both hands and feet, this comprehensive set ensures your manicure and pedicure needs are fully met. Simplify your nail care routine with a multi-functional tool designed for comprehensive care.

ASSORTED COLOR & SIZES: Our nail files come in a vibrant variety of colors (black and brown) and sizes, making it easy to find one that suits your style and manicure needs, whether at home or professionally.
description: Product Description This pack of Nail Files contains thirty files in assorted sizes and colors. Safety Warning No warning applicable
